testcase.name: test_post_rejects_status_DESIGN
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration2_changes.py:65: in test_post_rejects_status_DESIGN assert r.status_code == 400, ( E AssertionError: POST /api/projects with status=DESIGN must be 400; got 201 {"project":{"id":"cmqfnwuj800t3q49oq8dht3ov","name":"TEST_DESIGN_status_1781555107","code":"TDS1781555107","clientName":"x","location":"x","startDate":null,"expectedCompletion":null,"status":"DESIGN","createdAt":"2026-06-15T20:25:07.220Z","_count":{"floors":0,"tasks":0}}} E assert 201 == 400 E + where 201 = <Response [201]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_patch_rejects_status_DESIGN
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration2_changes.py:89: in test_patch_rejects_status_DESIGN assert r.status_code == 400, ( E AssertionError: PATCH project status=DESIGN must be 400; got 200 {"project":{"id":"cmqfnwuli00v6q49oheoshwk2","name":"TEST_st_PLANNING_1781555107268","code":"TPLA1781555107268","clientName":"x","location":"x","startDate":null,"expectedCompletion":null,"status":"DESIGN","createdAt":"2026-06-15T20:25:07.302Z"}} E assert 200 == 400 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_full_reject_then_designer_blocked

failure.message: AssertionError: DESIGNER must be blocked (403) from rejected file; got 200 %PDF-1.4 v1 assert 200 == 403 + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration2_changes.py:221: in test_full_reject_then_designer_blocked assert r.status_code == 403, ( E AssertionError: DESIGNER must be blocked (403) from rejected file; got 200 %PDF-1.4 v1 E assert 200 == 403 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
